name: Guangdong Hotata Technology Group Co.,Ltd.
summary: Guangdong Hotata Technology Group Co.,Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, sale, and service of household drying appliances in China. It offers smart clothes washing machines, hand-cranked products, smart products, aluminum ladder products, and home boutiques, as well as floating and floor products. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Guangzhou, China.
